opinion.h4: BELLEW ET AL. v. MISSISSIPPI. APPEAL FROM AND PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSISSIPPI. No. 806. Decided June 22, 1959.
opinion.p: Mrs. Clare Sekul Hornsby, John M. Sekul and Albert Sidney Johnston, Jr. for appellants-petitioners.
The appeal is dismissed and the petition for writ of certiorari is denied.
McDANIEL ET AL. v. ROSE. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF CIVIL APPEALS OF TEXAS, ELEVENTH SUPREME JUDICIAL DISTRICT. No. 830, Misc. Decided June 22, 1959.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
